update order_product_comment
store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
store_name = #{storeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_sku_id = #{productSkuId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_code = #{orderCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item_code = #{orderItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
member_name = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
member_image = #{memberImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
content_image = #{contentImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_score = #{productScore,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delivery_score = #{deliveryScore,jdbcType=INTEGER},
service_score = #{serviceScore,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment_time = #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_status = #{replyStatus,jdbcType=BIT},
reply_content = #{replyContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
reply_content_image = #{replyContentImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
